reason: Manual finding added to frontier state

assertion.text: First Proof second batch (published 2026-06-10, 1stproof.org): 4 systems (IMProofBench ProofCouncil; UCLA Moonshot harness, Sahai/Tao; OpenAI GPT-5.5 Pro; Princeton Momus, Arora/Fowl) blind-refereed by human mathematicians on 10 unpublished research problems. Topline: 7 problems had at least one submission essentially flawless or needing minor revisions; 2 best-submissions required major revisions; 1 complete failure. Grading is expert review only - no machine verification; referee reports published. Source: 1stproof.org/second-batch.html + assets/docs/report.pdf.

conditions.text: Manually added finding; requires evidence review before scientific use.

provenance.title: First Proof Project second batch report (1stproof.org), 2026-06-10

decision_reason: Bulk triage 2026-06-15: automated draft (watcher/extractor/ingest), not adjudicated; declining to keep the review gate meaningful. Recoverable from its Carina packet if needed.
caveats: Manual findings require evidence review before scientific use.
